---
text: Core Concept
text-fr: Concept clé
---

Note: no tags and no direct `style` set here — this node resolves through the style-mapper's `default` entry. `image` intentionally omitted — see `Node Intro.md` for the `icon` variant instead. An `image:` field was not stubbed in this demo since it needs a real vault image to resolve; flag if you want one added.
